---
title: "Home"
---

# Data Analysis & Visualization Portfolio

I analyze complex data, build clear visualizations, and communicate findings in ways people can use.

This portfolio highlights projects that combine data analysis, visualization, and scientific storytelling.

## Featured Projects

- [Mapping *Crotaphytus collaris* sightings in Oklahoma](projects/lizard/collared-lizard.qmd)
- [What do PhD graduates do after graduation?](projects/phd/phd-careers.qmd)
- [Evidence of Sex Chromosomes? (coming soon)](projects/training/teaching-training.qmd)

## What this portfolio shows

- Data cleaning and analysis
- Visualization design
- Interpretation of real-world datasets
- Clear communication of findings
